long_description:
[CD]-Tekton Sysdig not reporting data [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://github.ibm.com/nextgen-environments/ngdc-dev-regions/wiki/NGDC-CD-VMaaS-Support-Runbook
TIP Situation: Observed sysdig-host-down issue in vmaas-tekton
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agent is not running on vpc-tekton-8-ngdc-staging
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-continuous-deploy:us-south:::host:vpc-tekton-8-ngdc-staging
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    (count(count_over_time(sysdig_host_up{host_hostname=~"vpc-tekton-.*"}[1h])) by (host_hostname) unless count(count_over_time(sysdig_host_up{host_hostname=~"vpc-tekton-.*"}[1m])) by (host_hostname)) == 1 = 1
Segment:
    host_hostname = 'vpc-tekton-8-ngdc-staging'

Time:             12/03/2025 10:48 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179361229%2Fdetails
